solver-source-warning.unselected-sources: Warning: Variables referenced in the solver expression are not selected as source variables

solver-help.title: Syntax help for solver expressions
solver-help.description: Solver expressions are evaluated with math.js. Refer to source variables with ${VariableName}; ${VAR[0]} accesses the first fragment (indices start at 0).
solver-help.policies: Optionally append policies for empty/missing and non-numeric values: ${VAR[i]:emptyPolicy:nonNumericPolicy}. Allowed values are ERROR, INC, or a numeric default.
solver-help.fragment-mismatch: If the value does not match the fragmenting regular expression, the fragment is treated as missing and the first policy is applied.

examples.variables: add values from two source variables
examples.condition: condition: result is 1 when points are at least 5, otherwise 0
examples.fragment-policies: use fraction fragments; missing or non-numeric fragments produce CODING_INCOMPLETE
